strengths: ~17 years of continuous software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, satisfying the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, took on ownership roles at early-stage companies (WatchUp, RIDE Capital), and contributes to open-source platforms
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq signals active engagement with the current AI ecosystem
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in AI or a related technical field; holds a BS in CS and a Fine Arts degree, falling short of the preferred academic profile
AI involvement appears shallow and recent — MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling are supportive infrastructure work, not evidence of building or shipping AI-powered products at scale
No demonstrated director-level IC behaviors: no record of advising strategic customers, shaping product or platform strategy, or inspiring cross-organizational technical direction

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of engineering experience

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically versatile engineer with strong full-stack and infrastructure credentials and a genuine entrepreneurial streak, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role calls for a director-level IC who can drive AI-platform strategy, advise enterprise customers, and demonstrate a track record of shipping recognized AI products — none of which surface clearly in this resume. His AI work is recent and appears infrastructure-adjacent rather than strategic or product-defining, and his profile lacks the executive-influence behaviors or advanced AI credentials the role prioritizes.
